mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM orders o WHERE

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.order_status, o.pay_status, o.delivery_status, o.customer_name, o.customer_mobile, o.payable_amount, o.paid_amount, o.created_at FROM orders o WHERE ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE id = #{id} AND merchant_id = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.order_status, o.pay_status, o.delivery_status, o.customer_name, o.customer_mobile, o.receiver_name, o.receiver_mobile, o.address_detail, o.total_amount, o.payable_amount, o.paid_amount, o.seller_remark, o.delivery_time, o.created_at FROM orders o WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.merchant_id = 1 AND o.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, product_id, product_no, product_name, sku_attr, unit_price, quantity, line_total_amount, item_status FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND merchant_id = 1 AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE orders SET delivery_status = 2, order_status = 2, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, seller_remark = #{sellerRemark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND merchant_id = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
